textByHash.1b8f56b851e70a0655ebd89fa3cba6aa79b9bfa9: Do you think you've got the intellect to complete this one?
textByHash.23fa3289290d8bd52c500f439212c22538aacc80: We become more fractured by the day. Earlier I heard someone claiming that Ennius and Furia weren't actually Ralos and Ranul reborn at all!
textByHash.2658777e2bbd2707453a0d7cd3d04dd907efa3d8: Greetings, friend. Our time grows ever near. Ralos and Ranul will unite us all as one, and we will create a new world.
textByHash.2b3721bb5f6ee1f9af2d20f670170830f9f022bc: Then you should put on your robes. They must be worn while in the temple.
textByHash.3788a34f49649ea90be6670894dc261960ed3a13: Another group left earlier. Without the Augur to guide them, they are lost.
textByHash.6e6254c64ea30a3339460da894faddfc8689f274: I can't let you down there without the passphrase.
textByHash.886b06bea444993ce2a79234727566a2ce77a9a1: The Augur may be gone, but we remain. We must stay true to her teachings.
textByHash.8bb7b7518cec37c91f3cc8dbba5f389d78c213aa: Nice try. Only those worthy to know the passphrase may enter.
textByHash.9866072c8a5ea673a565d38ae3174365866ed063: The Final Dawn approaches, friend. We will deliver Twilight's Promise.
textByHash.b374e74a37b545de4310e3938ea19efec03aacd6: It is an honour to serve the Augur. She will lead us to Mokhaiotl.
textByHash.b48c50e0c4a0ce4a1094c9430284e051e27087e0: Struggling? I've seen a lot of people fail to work this one out.
textByHash.cb88a9346eed43e6ed9eb9982fa854360a993890: The people of this world do not have the strength to do what must be done. Ximoua will only come to be if we make it so.
textByHash.d31a4f8d37f25edb6482da788132374866594116: I can't believe the Augur is gone. I really thought she would lead us to the Final Dawn.
textByHash.d94f13799e23f9390aa96411d799b7f1b49039e4: I admit, that was pretty fast. Still, it will take more than that for you to prove your worth.
textByHash.ddf183f80b360b3b4d73292555ebe6926ecfbc92: I don't know if you'll ever figure this one out!
textByHash.dfe82ac4a8b36a399ebf596ed77b9c3ff3680964: Hey! You don't have permission to go in there!
